violations.text: Self-serve food items (toppings, empanadas, burgers, chicken sandwiches, crunch rolls, pretzles, hot dogs, Tornados, pizza, brownies, cinnamon rolls, muffins, scones, donuts, fritters, and danishes) in the food establishment are lacking labels. Self-serve food in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, and the major allergens. Food labels must be visible and placed with the corresponding food items. Please email inspector proof of correction. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025

The ice machine and soda machine are lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025
